name: wibaek-review
description: Engineering Review Workflows for Code, Architecture, and System Design

interface.longDescription: Wibaek Review packages reusable read-only workflows for lightweight diff review, architecture-first repository and system review, deep six-subagent review, validation, impact analysis, and final review reports.
defaultPrompt: Run a Wibaek Review on this repository.
Run a deep Wibaek Review on this repository.
Run a Wibaek Review on this PR, commit, branch diff, or working-tree patch.
